falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 indicates extreme overbought conditions, contradicting the current HOLD signal and suggesting a reversal rather than a continuation of the bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 breaks above 5,500 with a close above 5,520

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
